name: oneprotect-playwright-framework
description: Playwright TypeScript automation framework for apps using OneProtect SSO redirect login.

scripts.api:east: cross-env API_ENV=east npx playwright test tests/specs/api/pepboys-api.spec.ts --headed --workers=1 --reporter=html --output=test-results/east
scripts.api:west: cross-env API_ENV=west npx playwright test tests/specs/api/pepboys-api.spec.ts  --headed --workers=1 --reporter=html --output=test-results/west
scripts.api:shopx: cross-env API_ENV=shopx npx playwright test tests/specs/api/pepboys-api.spec.ts --headed --workers=1 --reporter=html --output=test-results/shopx
scripts.api:all:report: npm-run-all --parallel api:east api:west api:shopx && npm run api:master-report --reporter=html --output=test-results/masterreport
